title: erigeron argentatus
intro: Erigeron argentatus, also known as the silver fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Erigeron argentatus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Erigeron argentatus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in salves and creams to topicalize its medicinal properties.
